title: Add format_bead_history_plain and format_bead_field helpers to formatting.py
description: Add two new public helpers to `src/agent_takt/cli/formatting.py`. First, `format_bead_history_plain(entries, *, plain=False, terminal_width=None)` renders a chronological list of execution history entries: timestamp truncated to seconds (ISO-8601, no fractional), event column padded to a fixed width, summary truncated to fit terminal width when not plain. Second, implement a field path resolver and `format_bead_field(bead_dict, path_str)` that: parses a dotted path with bracket array indexing (including negative indices); returns the resolved value rendered per the spec table (bare str, str(int/float), lowercase bool, empty line for null/empty-string, pretty JSON indent=2 for list/dict); raises a structured exception (or returns an error sentinel) with the path and actual list length for missing paths and out-of-range indices.
acceptance_criteria: format_bead_history_plain returns one line per entry in ascending timestamp order
Event column is padded to a consistent fixed width across all entries
Summary is truncated when plain=False and terminal_width is provided; full text when plain=True
format_bead_field resolves nested paths: status, handoff_summary.completed, execution_history[-1].event
null value returns empty line (just newline), exits zero
Bool values render as lowercase true / false
list/dict values render as pretty JSON with indent=2
Path not found raises a distinguishable error carrying the path string
Array out of range raises a distinguishable error carrying the path and actual length
